title: Fit test - Onboarding flow - Fit Test is present
scenario: Fit Test screen appears in onboarding after Pairing 2 with Skip/Test buttons matching Figma design when a fit-test-compatible device is connected.
steps: 4. Verify that the Fit Test screen appears next.
5. Ensure a device that supports fit test is connected.
6. Check that the screen matches the Figma design.
7. Confirm that Skip and Test buttons are present at the bottom of the screen.
expected: The Fit Test screen appears after the Pairing 2 screen in the onboarding flow, matches the Figma design, and displays Skip/Test buttons at the bottom.
